title: Earth Realms – Season 3
description: Official Modpack for the third season of the Earth Realms SMP.
body:
## Earth Realms Season 3 – Official Modpack

Get ready for another season of the Earth Realms SMP, this time with a couple twists, *or shall I say, mods!*

Whether you're into technical stuff or more of a creative soul, this season's modpack has a lot of both! Make some complex systems and machines with the Create Mod, decorate your base with **Create Deco** and **Create Copycats+**, explore the world with **Immersive Aircraft** and **Create: Steam & Rails**, cook away with **Farmers Delight**, and make those memories last with **Exporuse** and **Scholar**.

!["Earth Realms 3rd Season"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a76420c747c8494a9c24ff0d112c83944d175f22_0.webp)
